entries.text: Chat panel structure repaired — composer and messages were trapped inside the header's flex layout due to a missing closing tag
Fullscreen toggle button repositioned into the header action group (was position:absolute, now sits correctly in the flex row)
Messages no longer jump upward on hover — removed translateY lift from .msg:hover
Favicon path changed to relative (./) so the icon loads correctly when opening the file locally
Room Settings button now always visible when inside a room — was silently hidden due to admins.json 404 failing the admin check
Message transitions now only animate border-color and box-shadow — eliminates layout recomputes on every hover
